name: Tendril
description: Curling tendrils hooking around a corner, re-aiming their spiral on reseed.

code.style: --rule: ( --rot: @pick(0deg, 90deg, 180deg, 270deg); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { overflow: hidden; -webkit-transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); transform: rotate(@var(--rot)); :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: 120%; left: 12%; top: 12%; border: calc(9px / @Y) solid @p(var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4), var(--color5)); border-radius: 50%; -webkit-clip-path: polygon(0 0, 62% 0, 62% 62%, 0 62%); clip-path: polygon(0 0, 62% 0, 62% 62%, 0 62%); -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; } } -webkit-transition: ease 450ms; transition: ease 450ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
